/workspaces/SRB2web/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/emcc -s USE_SDL=2 -s USE_SDL_IMAGE=2 -s USE_SDL_MIXER=2 -s USE_SDL_TTF=2 -s USE_ZLIB=1 -s USE_LIBPNG=1 -s ASYNCIFY=1 -O3 -DNDEBUG -s USE_SDL=2 -s USE_SDL_IMAGE=2 -s USE_SDL_MIXER=2 -s USE_SDL_TTF=2 -s USE_ZLIB=1 -s USE_LIBPNG=1 -s ASYNCIFY=1 -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=["ccall","cwrap","UTF8ToString","stringToUTF8","lengthBytesUTF8","allocate","intArrayFromString"] -lidbfs.js @CMakeFiles/SRB2SDL2.dir/objects1.rsp -o ../bin/srb2.js
